productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Striped White T-shirt
description: Composition Blue and white striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a blue and orange ribbed neckline, short sleeves with orange ribbed cuffs, brand badge appliquéd on the left chest, a number appliquéd on the right sleeve, buttoned chest placket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This stylish polo T-shirt from status quo makes you look chic with ease. The appliquéd brand seal enhances the brand image while the two toned collar adds a fashionable touch and, as it's crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
